signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2% (up from 2.0% in prior months, below 2.4% forecasts) | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's Consumer Price Index data for March 2026, released around early April 2026, shows **annual inflation rose to 2.2%** from 2.0% in January and February, missing market expectations of 2.4%.[1] A secondary source reports it at precisely **2.16%

signals.headline: Solana (SOL) Surges 10% on Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders and Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Confirmation | YES |
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL) Surges 10% on Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders and Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade Confirmation | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]  
SOL hit an all-time high of 167 million monthly token holders with 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026, driving the price surge amid the Alpenglow upgrade that reduces transaction finality to 150 milliseconds.[1]  
This milestone,

signals.headline: Nuclear Suspension Proposals Exchanged | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Nuclear Suspension Proposals Exchanged | YES | HIGH confidence**
The U.S. and Iran have traded competing proposals on Iranian nuclear activities: Iran proposed a five-year suspension while the U.S. is seeking a 20-year moratorium.[4]

signals.headline: China Warns Against Blockade | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
China Warns Against Blockade | YES | HIGH confidence**
China's Defense Ministry condemned the blockade as "dangerous and irresponsible," asserting its trade and energy agreements with Iran remain valid.[4]

The most market-moving development is the simultaneous escalation (blockade implementation) and de-escalation (ceasefire extension talks), creating significant uncertainty about the trajectory
